case_title: RACHEL MARSHA MURIEL VS. BAUER'S INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF RACHEL MARSHA MURIEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAUER'S INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEEMED PROPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURIEL, RACHEL MARSHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUER'S INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION $8,045.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,160.00, SERVICE IS VALID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
